title: CIO | vCIO | Chief Information Officer - WFH & Flexible
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We’re looking for a high-caliber CIO to deliver part-time executive IT leadership for our SME clients. You'll drive IT strategy, digital transformation, and governance across varied industries. This is a consulting-style role ideal for seasoned professionals who can align technology with business outcomes while managing multiple clients through structured engagements.

Key Responsibilities

Business-Aligned IT Strategy & Governance

  • Design and execute multi-year IT roadmaps aligned with business goals and stakeholder priorities.
  • Build IT governance using COBIT, ITIL, and ISO frameworks with real operational impact.

Digital Transformation & Data Modernization

  • Lead cloud migration, automation initiatives, and data platform modernization.
  • Drive adoption of AI-powered analytics for finance, ops, and customer intelligence.

Operational Intelligence & KPI Management

  • Implement IT performance dashboards, SLAs, and real-time service insights.
  • Enable cross-department visibility into system health, uptime, and cost efficiency.

Cost Optimization & Vendor Oversight

  • Evaluate vendor contracts, SaaS usage, and shadow IT to optimize spend and reduce risk.
  • Build procurement strategies with centralized governance and scalability.

Change Management & Cross-Functional Enablement

  • Drive change adoption across departments with minimal disruption and strong alignment.
  • Deliver IT tooling that enhances decision-making, compliance, and reporting.

Data Governance & Risk Control

  • Oversee lifecycle management, master data structures, and AI data control points.
  • Ensure privacy, compliance, and auditability across all digital systems.

Requirements

  • 10+ years in IT leadership, digital transformation, or enterprise systems roles.
  • Expertise in cloud strategy, data analytics, ITSM, and cross-functional enablement.
  • Deep understanding of AI in operational optimization and regulatory context.
  • Familiar with IT governance tools, business continuity frameworks, and stakeholder management.
  • Available for engagement-based CIO leadership for SMEs and growth-stage companies.

Engagement Benefits

  • Lead multiple high-impact projects without full-time commitment
  • Monthly recurring income across client engagements
  • Potential to earn more depending on engagement scope
  • Mostly remote and flexible, work from anywhere
  • Join expert-only C-level events and advisory circles
  • Perfect side role if you have bandwidth beyond your day job

postedCompany.description:
ASLabs is the cybersecurity division of Cybercore Labs, built to protect and empower SMEs and enterprises across the globe. We deliver enterprise-grade cybersecurity solutions with the agility, clarity, and commitment modern organizations need to stay resilient in a rapidly evolving threat landscape.

Our core offerings include:
✔ Identity & Access Management
✔ Data Security & Privacy
✔ Managed Cybersecurity & BAU Operations

We also offer fractional CxO services:

✔ CISO-as-a-Service – Security strategy & compliance leadership

✔ CTO-as-a-Service – Secure technology enablement

✔ CIO-as-a-Service – Business-aligned IT direction


Driven by purpose, ASLabs exists to secure meaningful progress, for businesses and for the world. Through our work, we help organizations build trust, ensure compliance, and scale with confidence.

Powered by Cybercore Labs, our mission extends beyond Cybersecurity as 50% profits purposefully engaged to uplift the undeserved communities. 


Websites: 

https://cybercorelabs.co/

https://ahoseclabs.com/
